'''鈭歯g-n-t-g''' ('''kangantegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cumshaw|cumshaw]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cumshaw|cumshaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-n-t-g
|-
! Lemma
| kangantegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingantegoko|thingantegoko]] || [[word:jingantegoko|jingantegoko]] || [[word:shingantegoko|shingantegoko]] || [[word:kingantegoko|kingantegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungantegoko|thuthungantegoko]] || [[word:jujungantegoko|jujungantegoko]] || [[word:shushungantegoko|shushungantegoko]] || [[word:kukungantegoko|kukungantegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongantegoko|thothongantegoko]] || [[word:jojongantegoko|jojongantegoko]] || [[word:shoshongantegoko|shoshongantegoko]] || [[word:kokongantegoko|kokongantegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongantegoko|thongantegoko]] || [[word:jongantegoko|jongantegoko]] || [[word:shongantegoko|shongantegoko]] || [[word:kongantegoko|kongantegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngantegoko|th忙ngantegoko]] || [[word:j忙ngantegoko|j忙ngantegoko]] || [[word:sh忙ngantegoko|sh忙ngantegoko]] || [[word:k忙ngantegoko|k忙ngantegoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangantegoko|thangantegoko]] || [[word:jangantegoko|jangantegoko]] || [[word:shangantegoko|shangantegoko]] || [[word:kangantegoko|kangantegoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
